CustomField.description: 1 to 1 relation between relate Accounts (Partners with Prospects or Partners with Customers) that we have sold to or trying to sell to.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For the Partner team to relate Partner Accounts with associated Non-Partner Accounts.
CustomField.label: Related Customer Account

lookupFilter.errorMessage: The related account must be a CUSTOMER Account. Please update by selecting a Customer account or remove the value.
lookupFilter.infoMessage: Only Customer Accounts are available in search.
